trust_report.cds_edition_used: 2025-2026 (latest available; 2026-2027 not yet posted as of 2026-06-16)
trust_report.doctrine: null-over-guess; deterministic fields anchored to CDS/Scorecard with provenance; high-stakes fields blind-verified; arithmetic-gated; every source consulted is logged

overall_acceptance_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
overall_acceptance_rate.quote: CDS C1 (Fall 2025): Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who applied = 87220; who were admitted = 37881. 37881/87220 = 43.4%.

in_state_acceptance_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
in_state_acceptance_rate.quote: CDS C1 residency table (Fall 2025): In-State applied = 12040, In-State admitted = 8559. 8559/12040 = 71.1%.

out_of_state_acceptance_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
out_of_state_acceptance_rate.quote: CDS C1 residency table (Fall 2025): Out-of-State applied = 58853, Out-of-State admitted = 25650. 25650/58853 = 43.6%.

international_acceptance_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
international_acceptance_rate.quote: CDS C1 residency table (Fall 2025): International applied = 16327, International admitted = 3672. 3672/16327 = 22.5%.

applications_total.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
applications_total.quote: CDS C1: 'Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who applied ... Total | 87220' (Fall 2025); also gender split 53833 males + 33387 females = 87220.

admits_total.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
admits_total.quote: CDS C1: 'Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who were admitted ... Total | 37881' (Fall 2025); gender split 21509 males + 16372 females = 37881.

enrolled_total.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
enrolled_total.quote: CDS C1: 'Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who enrolled ... Total | 9656' (Fall 2025); gender split 5708 males + 3948 females = 9656.

yield_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)

admits_class_size.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
admits_class_size.quote: CDS C1: 'Total first-time, first-year (degree-seeking) who enrolled ... Total | 9656' = entering first-year class size (Fall 2025).

sat_composite_middle_50.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
sat_composite_middle_50.quote: CDS C9: 'SAT Composite | 25th Percentile 1220 | 50th Percentile 1360 | 75th Percentile 1470' (Fall 2025 enrolled first-year).

sat_reading_middle_50.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
sat_reading_middle_50.quote: CDS C9: 'SAT Evidence-Based Reading and Writing | 25th 610 | 50th 670 | 75th 730' (Fall 2025).

sat_math_middle_50.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)

act_composite_middle_50.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)

test_submission_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
test_submission_rate.quote: CDS C9: 'Submitting SAT Scores | 0.8384424192212097 | 8096' and 'Submitting ACT Scores | 0.22649130074565038 | 2187'. Reporting SAT submission rate = 83.8% (8096 enrollees); ACT submission rate separately = 22.6% (2187). CDS reports these separately, not a single combined any-test rate.

gpa_unweighted_avg.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
gpa_unweighted_avg.quote: CDS C12: 'Average high school GPA of all degree-seeking, first-time, first-year students who submitted GPA: | 3.81' (4.0 scale; 92.8% submitted GPA).

race_white.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
race_white.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'White, non-Hispanic | 4801'. 4801/9656 enrolled = 49.7%.

race_black.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
race_black.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'Black or African American, non-Hispanic | 240'. 240/9656 = 2.5%.

race_hispanic.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)

race_asian.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)

race_native_american.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
race_native_american.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'American Indian or Alaska Native, non-Hispanic | 18'. 18/9656 = 0.2%.

race_pacific_islander.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
race_pacific_islander.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander, non-Hispanic | 4'. 4/9656 = 0.04% (rounds to 0.0%).

race_two_or_more.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
race_two_or_more.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'Two or more races, non-Hispanic | 610'. 610/9656 = 6.3%.

race_unknown.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
race_unknown.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'Race and/or ethnicity unknown | 374'. 374/9656 = 3.9%.

race_international.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)

international_percentage.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
international_percentage.quote: CDS B2 (first-time first-year column): 'Nonresidents | 536' out of 9656 enrolled first-year = 5.6% international/nonresident.

freshman_retention_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
freshman_retention_rate.quote: CDS B22: Fall 2024 first-time full-time cohort = 11357; still enrolled Fall 2025 = 10490; 'percentage of the Fall 2024 entering cohort who remained enrolled = 0.9236594170995862' = 92.4%.

graduation_rate_6_year.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
graduation_rate_6_year.quote: CDS B (Graduation Rates) line H: 'Six-year graduation rate for 2019 cohort (G divided by C) ... Total | 0.8388008354834746' = 83.9% (G=6827 graduated / C=8139 final cohort).

in_state_tuition.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026, Section G-PWL (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
in_state_tuition.quote: CDS G1 (2026-2027 academic year, public institution): 'Tuition: In-state (out-of-district): | 9718' (first-year undergraduate). Required Fees listed separately as 274.

median_earnings_10yr.source: U.S. Dept of Education College Scorecard API (api.data.gov)
median_earnings_10yr.quote: College Scorecard API for id 243780 (Purdue University-Main Campus): {"latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median":72424,"school.name":"Purdue University-Main Campus","id":243780}. Field = median earnings 10 years after entry.
median_earnings_10yr.as_of_cycle: College Scorecard latest release (2024-2025 data file)

test_policy_details.value: Test-required: SAT or ACT required to be considered for admission
test_policy_details.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
test_policy_details.quote: CDS C8 (policies for students applying for Fall 2027): 'SAT or ACT | [x] Required to be considered for admission'. C8A = Yes (institution uses SAT/ACT in admission decisions). C8D: uses scores for academic advising = No.

waitlist_offered.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
waitlist_offered.quote: CDS C2 (Fall 2025): 'Number of qualified applicants offered a place on waiting list: | 8981'.

waitlist_accepted.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
waitlist_accepted.quote: CDS C2 (Fall 2025): 'Number accepting a place on the waiting list: | 4047'.

waitlist_admitted.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
waitlist_admitted.quote: CDS C2 (Fall 2025): 'Number of wait-listed students admitted: | 3916'.

waitlist_admit_rate.source: Purdue University Common Data Set 2025-2026 (West Lafayette / Main Campus)
waitlist_admit_rate.quote: CDS C2 (Fall 2025): admitted off waitlist 3916 / accepted place on waitlist 4047 = 96.8%. (If computed against offered 8981, the rate is 43.6%; reporting admit-of-accepted per standard waitlist-admit-rate definition.)

notes: Direct download of latest CDS edition (2025-2026); fetched successfully as 976.7KB xlsx binary, confirming the link is live. 2026-2027 file does not yet exist on the index.

Primary source. Parsed sheets CDS-A (confirmed West Lafayette/Main Campus), CDS-C (C1/C2/C8/C9/C12 admissions, test, GPA), CDS-B (B2 race, B22 retention, B 6-year graduation), CDS-G-PWL (2026-2027 cost of attendance components).

PRIMARY AP source. Quoted: Economics combined Macro+Micro rule, '1XXXX' undistributed-credit definition, College Board code 1631 submission line, and 'AP transfer credit criteria are subject to change without notice.'

PRIMARY IB source. Quoted: 'Effective fall 2025, IB exams are scored on a 1–7 scale', 'Students must earn a score of 4 or higher to receive Purdue credit', SL+HL eligibility line, submission line, and disclaimer. Verified NO IB Diploma bonus and NO HL-only restriction on re-fetch.

Anchor cost page. Took aid philosophy framing (tuition freeze / affordability + accessibility land-grant mission) and links to the scholarships, DFA, Indy Scholars, and net-price-calculator pages. Tuition/COA dollar figures intentionally not restated.

Confirmed Indy Scholars details: $10,000/year minimum, 3.00 GPA, combinable with Presidential/Trustees, Common App campus-choice application method, Nov. 1 Early Action deadline, and entrepreneurship-certificate/career-consulting benefits. Confirmed international students generally ineligible.

Primary source for named scholarships (Trustees, Presidential, Lilly Scholars, Indy Scholars, National Recognition Programs) with exact amounts, residency differences, Nov. 1 (firm) deadline, automatic-consideration framing, and the quoted 'about 15% of applicants receive a merit award' figure used for percent_receiving_aid.

Official first-year deadlines page. PRIMARY SOURCE for deadlines: app opens Aug. 1, EA Nov. 1, RD Jan. 15, EA decision Jan. 15, RD decision by March 31, and the list of competitive priority-deadline majors. Common App platform. $60 fee.
